variables.name: text/primary
variables.description: Reflects the text.primary variable from the theme object

variables.name: text/secondary
variables.description: Reflects the text.secondary variable from the theme object

variables.name: text/disabled
variables.description: Reflects the text.disabled variable from the theme object

variables.name: text/_states/hover
variables.description: Used for hover states. The token represents the value of action.hoverOpacity (0.04 by default) of the main token.

variables.name: text/_states/selected
variables.description: Used for selected states. The token represents the value of action.selectedOpacity (0.08 by default) of the main token.

variables.name: text/_states/focus
variables.description: Used for focus states. The token represents the value of action.focusOpacity (0.12 by default) of the main token.

variables.name: text/_states/focusVisible
variables.description: Used for focus visible states. The token represents the value of focusVisibleOpacity (0.3 by default) of the main token.

variables.name: primary/main
variables.description: Reflects the primary.main variable from the theme object

variables.name: primary/dark
variables.description: Used for hover states. Reflects the primary.dark variable from the theme object

variables.name: primary/light
variables.description: Reflects the primary.light variable from the theme object

variables.name: primary/contrastText
variables.description: Reflects the primary.contrast variable from the theme object. Color that keeps a contrast ratio above AA when XX.main is used as a bg. color

variables.name: primary/_states/hover
variables.description: Used for hover states. The token represents the value of action.hoverOpacity (0.04 by default) of the main token.

variables.name: primary/_states/focus
variables.description: Used for focus states. The token represents the value of action.focusOpacity (0.12 by default) of the main token.

variables.name: primary/_states/outlinedBorder
variables.description: Used for enabled states (e.g Button outlined variant). The token represents the value of outlinedBorderOpacity (0.5 by default) of the main token.
